steps.title: Identify the logical consequence
steps.content: The prior sentence criticizes the USGS for omitting important considerations. The sentence with the blank concludes that their center was inaccurate. The transition must show how the omission led to this inaccuracy.

steps.title: Apply the causal signal
steps.content: ”Hence” marks the consequence: because the USGS omitted critical factors, their center was inaccurate. “Next” is merely sequential, “That being said” concedes without concluding, and “However” presents contrast rather than causation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
